details.smt2:
; benchmark generated from python API
(set-info :status unknown)
(declare-fun mft_created () Int)
(declare-fun observed_mft_created () Bool)
(declare-fun prefetch_last_run () Int)
(declare-fun observed_prefetch_last_run () Bool)
(declare-fun causal_mft_creation_must_not_postdate_prefetch_execution () Bool)
(assert
 (let (($x8 (= mft_created 1779286205)))
 (=> observed_mft_created $x8)))
(assert
 (let (($x31 (= prefetch_last_run 1779285733)))
 (=> observed_prefetch_last_run $x31)))
(assert
 (let (($x38 (<= mft_created (+ prefetch_last_run 300))))
(=> causal_mft_creation_must_not_postdate_prefetch_execution $x38)))
(check-sat)
